rationale: The citing paper states it extends theory-of-mind neuroscience from interpersonal settings to consumer advertising, and the cited paper is an fMRI marketing study of interpersonal mentalizing (SToM) with MPFC/TPJ evidence—strong topical and mechanism overlap. Given the exact DOI match and this alignment, it should be kept for full relation judgment.
